headline: A Unified Checklist for Modern Web Development
lede: The Website Specification aggregates fragmented technical standards into a single, actionable reference for modern developers. It aims to cut through framework bloat by focusing on core metrics like security and accessibility.

headline: Navigating London's Public Roof Terraces
lede: The skyline of London conceals a patchwork of accessible green spaces born from planning requirements. This guide inventories the public-facing terraces amidst the ongoing tension between private development and open access.

headline: Why Domain Expertise Remains Your Greatest Asset
lede: As agentic AI commoditizes code generation, the value of mechanical output continues to collapse. True differentiation now lies in the ability to verify, curate, and apply deep institutional knowledge to complex systems.
pullquote: The ability to verify AI outputs is the new primary bottleneck for software engineers.

headline: Paced Breathing Scripts for the macOS Terminal
lede: Breathe CLI provides a minimalist, dependency-free interface for resonance frequency breathing. Designed for daily autonomic regulation, the utility strips away the bloat of standard health applications.

headline: Visualizing Local Birdsong with Generative AI
lede: Combining Raspberry Pi hardware with acoustic classification models, this project transforms raw audio data into aesthetic woodblock-style illustrations. It offers a practical framework for home-based, real-time biodiversity monitoring.

headline: Shantell Sans Brings Organic Handwriting to Digital Design
lede: This open-source variable typeface moves beyond rigid typographic conventions by introducing organic 'Bounce' and 'Informality' axes. It captures the approachability of felt-tip ink in a fully modern digital format.

headline: Intuitive Frameworks for Differential Geometry
lede: Visualizing complex manifolds and differential forms often requires a bridge between symbolic math and conceptual intuition. This resource offers a pictorial guide to electromagnetism without the barrier of dense algebraic notation.

headline: The Mathematical Foundations of Lattice-Based Security
lede: As quantum computing threats emerge, lattice-based cryptography provides a new standard for post-quantum resilience. This technical primer details the LWE and SIS problems that secure our next generation of protocols.

headline: The AV2 Specification Marks the End of Legacy Encoding
lede: The Alliance for Open Media has finalized the AV2 specification, setting a new bar for compression efficiency. While it represents a leap forward for VR and streaming, the transition away from AV1 remains a long-term architectural shift.

headline: Mapping Desert Fossils Through Dimensionality Reduction
lede: After finding a fossil in the Saudi desert, a researcher turned to data science to solve a paleontological mystery. By mapping 60,000 shell contours, the project explores the limits of machine learning in classification.
